description: A feature spec template for adding or changing a REST API endpoint: request/response contract, validation, status codes, authentication, idempotency, pagination, compatibility, observability, and rollout.

variables.name: actor
variables.description: Primary caller of the API (a user role or client system).

variables.name: resourceName
variables.description: Name of the primary resource the endpoint exposes (singular, e.g. "order").

variables.name: basePath
variables.description: Base URL path of the endpoint group (e.g. "/api/v1/orders").

examples: specbridge template apply rest-api --name orders-list-endpoint --var resourceName=order --var basePath=/api/v1/orders
